name: github_list_jobs_for_workflow_run_attempt
description: List jobs for a specific workflow run attempt (GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/runs/{run_id}/attempts/{attempt_number}/jobs). Returns total_count and jobs. per_page 1-100 default 30, page, all_pages, max_pages. Anyone with read access can use this; classic tokens need repo scope for private repositories. See GitHub REST workflow jobs.
